mapper.insert: INSERT INTO book_page_slots (id, page_id, slot_id, type, value, visible, frame_style, crop_rect, transform, style, locked, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id,javaType=java.util.UUID,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{pageId,javaType=java.util.UUID,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{slotId}, #{type}, #{value}, COALESCE(#{visible,jdbcType=BOOLEAN}, TRUE), #{frameStyle}, #{cropRect}::jsonbNULL, #{transform}::jsonbNULL, #{style}::jsonbNULL, COALESCE(#{locked,jdbcType=BOOLEAN}, FALSE), NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE book_page_slots SET value = #{value}, visible = #{visible,jdbcType=BOOLEAN}, frame_style = #{frameStyle}, crop_rect = #{cropRect}::jsonbNULL, transform = #{transform}::jsonbNULL, style = #{style}::jsonbNULL, locked = #{locked,jdbcType=BOOLEAN}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id,javaType=java.util.UUID,jdbcType=OTHER}
